curation_notes: Patch commit fcd0c592 is the merge of PR #511 tagged as v2.8.0. The PR modifies 70 files across many admin components (noisy), but the GHSA specifically describes two defects in Settings/Team/Index (missing mount authorization) and Settings/Team/RolePermission (write actions gated on read-only view_users permission). Locations derived from the advisory description and confirmed by the patch diff. No sibling files in Pages/Settings/Team/ share the same vulnerability pattern — only Index.php and RolePermission.php exist in that directory. The Components/Settings/Team/ siblings (Permissions.php, UsersRole.php) already had authorize() calls; their changes were null-guard hardening, not auth-bypass fixes. Vulnerability class auth-bypass confirmed from CWE-269 (Improper Privilege Management) and CWE-285 (Improper Authorization) — the patch adds missing authorization gates and corrects permission levels.
